Bot.welcome_text: I'll send you a personal horoscope every morning.
Bot.sign_selected: Great! Your sign is {sign}. Now you'll receive forecasts.
Bot.plan_info_body: Basic — Daily forecast Plus — Compatibility + Affirmations Premium — Important dates + Flexible time
Bot.cancel_confirm: Are you sure? Access remains until the end of the period.
Bot.select_time_text: Choose a convenient time to receive the forecast (in your time zone):
Bot.time_updated: Great! Forecast will now arrive at {time}.
Bot.premium_only: Choosing delivery time is available only on the Premium plan. On your current plan the delivery time is fixed: 07:00.
Bot.select_tz_text: Select the city for your time zone:
Bot.tz_updated: Time zone updated: {zone}. Your current local time: {time}
Bot.trial_ended_text: Your trial period has ended! 🏁 We hope the stars helped you during the week. To continue receiving personalized forecasts, please subscribe.
Bot.subscribe_stopped_recurring_payment_erro: ⚠️ Subscription paused Auto-payment for plan ${sub.plan.name} failed (system error). Please reattach your card or contact support.
Bot.success_binding: ✅ Card successfully linked! Your trial is activated. Charges will occur only after it ends.
Bot.success_recurrent_payment: ✅ Subscription renewed successfully! Thank you for staying with us. Next charge: {nextDateStr}.
Bot.payment_failed: ⛔️ Subscription paused `{reasonText} `We couldn't renew access. Please top up your balance to restore the subscription.

aries.love: Today the stars favor romance. Mars in your sign adds passion.
aries.money: A good day for financial negotiations. Your confidence will persuade partners.
aries.mood: Energy is through the roof — channel it into creativity or sport.
aries.advice: Take the first step in an important matter — now is the perfect moment.

taurus.love: Venus makes you especially attractive. Time to strengthen relationships.
taurus.money: Stability is your trump card. Avoid risky investments.
taurus.mood: Calmness and confidence are your main allies today.
taurus.advice: Treat yourself to something nice — you deserve it.

gemini.love: Communication is the key to your partner's heart. Your wit charms.
gemini.money: A good day for short deals and negotiations.
gemini.advice: Write down your ideas — there are some golden ones among them.

cancer.love: The Moon heightens intuition in relationships. Trust your feelings.
cancer.mood: Emotional depth is your strength today.
cancer.advice: Spend the evening with close ones.

leo.love: Your charisma is at its peak. Time for important confessions.
leo.money: Generosity will come back to you tenfold. Don't be afraid to invest in yourself.
leo.mood: Solar energy fills you with optimism.
leo.advice: Allow yourself to be in the spotlight — it's your day.

virgo.love: Attention to detail will strengthen your partner's trust.
virgo.money: An analytical approach will bring profit.
virgo.advice: Spend 15 minutes planning — the result will exceed expectations.

libra.love: Harmony in relationships comes through compromise.
libra.money: Partnership projects will be mutually profitable.
libra.mood: A desire for beauty makes the day special.
libra.advice: Find balance between work and rest.

scorpio.love: The depth of your feelings attracts — be sincere.
scorpio.money: Intuition will point to a profitable deal.
scorpio.advice: Let go of what no longer serves you.

sagittarius.love: Optimism is contagious — share it with your partner.
sagittarius.money: Bold ideas may bring unexpected profit.
sagittarius.mood: A thirst for adventure leads to interesting encounters.
sagittarius.advice: Broaden your horizons — the world is full of opportunities.

capricorn.love: Reliability is your main virtue in your partner's eyes.
capricorn.advice: Set one important goal and take a step toward it.

aquarius.mood: Freedom of thought opens new horizons.
aquarius.advice: Don't be afraid to be yourself — it's your superpower.

pisces.love: Romance is in the air. Trust your intuition.
pisces.money: A creative approach to finances will open new sources.
pisces.mood: Dreaminess is not a weakness but a gift.
pisces.advice: Devote time to creativity — it will fill your soul.

faqs.question: How do I cancel the subscription?
faqs.answer: Use the /cancel command in the bot or the button in your account. Access remains until the end of the period.

faqs.question: When do forecasts arrive?
faqs.answer: At 07:30 in your time zone. On Premium you can choose any time.

faqs.question: How does the trial work?
faqs.answer: 7 days free. Cancel before the end — you won't be charged.

faqs.question: What payment methods are available?
faqs.answer: Visa, Mastercard, Belkart via the secure bePaid gateway.

FAQSection.have_more_questions: Have more questions? Message the bot

testimonials.name: Anna M.
testimonials.text: I started reading the forecasts every morning — now it's my little ritual. The tips are really helpful and set me up for the day!

testimonials.name: Dmitry K.
testimonials.text: I was skeptical about horoscopes, but these forecasts pleasantly surprised me. No fluff — just concrete recommendations.

testimonials.name: Elena V.
testimonials.text: Very convenient to receive the forecast right in Telegram. The daily compatibility with my husband is a big plus — helps understand each other better.

testimonials.name: Maxim T.
testimonials.text: Subscribed to Premium — satisfied! Important dates for the month help plan meetings and negotiations. I recommend it.

testimonials.name: Olga S.
testimonials.text: Daily affirmations are my favorite feature. They help keep a positive mindset even on tough days.
